name: stackra/compliance-sdk
purpose: Typed Saloon SDK for the Compliance service — DSAR, consent, retention, legal holds, subprocessors, safeguarding. Umbrella client built on stackra/api-sdk.
when_to_use: A consumer service that needs to write or query compliance data (audit, activity, consent) cross-service.
when_not_to_use: For in-process attribute + observer wiring, use the sibling audit + activity packages directly.
